name: Jetpack Fury
author: Poki
description: Jetpack Fury is an adrenaline-pumping flying game where you soar through vibrant, themed worlds as an animal equipped with a powerful jetpack. Dodge dynamic obstacles and skillfully guide your flight path using the mouse. The more you play, the more you unlock new animals and epic jetpacks. If you manage to hit targets accross the finish line, you can also transform the level into a lively playground full of fun surprises! Can you master every thrilling challenge in Jetpack Fury? How do I play Jetpack Fury? Click and drag with your mouse to fly in up/down, and left/right. Dodge all the obstacles and make your way to the finish line! Who created Jetpack Fury? Jetpack Fury is created by Petit Kyanpu. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Jetpack Fury for free? You can play Jetpack Fury for free on Poki. Can I play Jetpack Fury on mobile devices and desktop? Jetpack Fury can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
